title: leucanthemum rotundifolium
intro: Leucanthemum rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaved oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum rotundifolium are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
